title: CheckllmConfig
description: Configuration schema for the checkllm framework. Mirrors the [tool.checkllm] table in pyproject.toml and checkllm.yaml's top-level settings.

judge_backend.description: Backend used to create the default LLM judge.

judge_model.description: Model name passed to the judge backend, e.g. 'gpt-4o' or 'claude-sonnet-4-6'.

default_threshold.description: Default pass/fail threshold for metric-based assertions (0.0-1.0).

runs_per_test.description: Number of times each test is repeated for variance estimation.

snapshot_dir.description: Directory where snapshot results are stored.

confidence_level.description: Confidence level used by statistical comparison reports.

p_value_threshold.description: P-value threshold under which a regression is considered significant.

cache_enabled.description: Whether judge responses are cached on disk.

cache_dir.description: Directory used by the on-disk response cache.

cache_ttl_seconds.description: TTL for cached judge responses, in seconds. 0 disables expiry.

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of in-flight judge calls. Higher values trade latency for rate-limit risk.

budget.description: Maximum USD to spend on judge calls. Null means unlimited.

log_level.description: Logging verbosity for the checkllm package.

engine.description: Execution engine to use when running a check suite.

active_profile.description: Active configuration profile name resolved at load time.

providers.description: List of LLM provider definitions used by declarative evals.

metrics.description: Optional explicit list of metric names to enable or expose.

env.description: Environment variables to load before running checks.

profiles.description: Named overrides. Key is the profile name; values are partial configs.
